queue.title: Auto-escalation for E/R cost trends in audit-checks

Add e_session_cost and r_session_cost to escalation_tracker — same pattern as existing b_session_cost escalation. When threshold_crossed is true ($1.50 for E, $2.00 for R), auto-create wq items. queue.title: Add tw_run_fn helper to timeout-wrapper.sh
queue.description: Currently tw_run requires 'bash -c ...' for multi-line check logic. Adding a tw_run_fn helper that wraps function dispatch (declare -f + call) would simplify future hook migrations to timeout-wrapper.sh. Small utility addition, clear scope.

queue.title: A session human-review schema validation before wq creation

The A session should run validate-human-review.mjs (or check required fields) before creating data-hygiene wq items. Prevents false-positive queue items that waste B session time on investigation.
